input.user_input: Are there any audit rights granted to either party in this vendor agreement?

actual:
I do not see a vendor agreement attached to your message. 

Please upload or provide the text of the vendor agreement, and I will gladly review it to determine if any audit rights are granted to either party, including the scope, frequency, and notice requirements of those rights.
